items.name: Turkey Navy Marine Commando Tab
items.description:
Turkey UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=+Turkey+&taxonomy=8i1sggNTrxoN799hpRrR1S&CreatorName=titanite+Holdings+ugc+group&salesTypeFilter=1

[ADJUST IT TO FIT]

Full Tab Collection: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Tab&taxonomy=8i1sggNTrxoN799hpRrR1S&CreatorName=titanite+Holdings+ugc+group&salesTypeFilter=1

"Deniz Komando"

The Deniz Komando are the amphibious commando forces of the Turkish Naval Forces, specialising in amphibious assault, coastal raids, and maritime interdiction operations. The arc-shaped tab is worn as a unit identifier alongside the SAT insignia and Turkish Naval Forces branch crest on operational field uniforms. Turkey's marine commandos have participated in major operations including the amphibious landing at Kyrenia during the 1974 Cyprus operation and modern NATO maritime security missions across the Mediterranean and the Horn of Africa.
